name: Chubb Arabia Cooperative Insurance Company
summary: Chubb Arabia Cooperative Insurance Company operates as a multiline property and casualty insurer in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. The company offers property and casualty insurance products comprising property all risks, fire and allied perils, business interruption, householders', terrorism and sabotage, burglary and housebreaking, general liability, workmen's compensation and employer's liability, motor, plate glass, money, crime, fidelity guarantee/employee dishonesty, and travel insurance products. It also provides engineering insurance products comprising contractors all risk, erection all risks, machinery breakdown, business interruption due to machinery breakdown, and computer/electronic data processing, as well as machinery, plant, and equipment all risks insurance products. In addition, the company offers marine cargo, project cargo and DSU, inland transit, and marine hull insurance products; group life and group personal accident insurance products; and financial insurance products, such as bankers blanket bond, financial institutions professional indemnity, civil liability for financial institutions, electronic and computer crime, fraud protector, financial services industry insurance policy, and directors and officers liability insurance. It serves multinational corporations and local businesses, companies, and affinity groups. Chubb Arabia Cooperative Insurance Company was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Al Khobar, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
